Tessera

AI-Powered Public Goods Evaluation for Ethereum

Automate quantitative analysis, trust graph evaluation, and mechanism simulation to help evaluators make better funding decisions in the Octant and Gitcoin ecosystems.

Launch DashboardView on GitHub

What It Does

Four core capabilities to evaluate public goods projects at scale.

Trust Graph Analysis

Jaccard similarity, Shannon entropy, sybil detection, and whale dependency scoring for every project.

Mechanism Simulation

Compare QF variants: Standard, Capped, Equal-weight, and Trust-Weighted with Gini coefficients and fairness metrics.

Deep AI Evaluation

Claude Opus 4.6 scores projects across 8 dimensions: Impact, Team, Innovation, Sustainability, Ecosystem, Transparency, Community, Risk.

PDF Intelligence Reports

Branded, watermarked PDF reports with executive summaries, charts, and actionable recommendations.

Get Started

Four steps from zero to a running dashboard.

01

Clone & Build

git clone https://github.com/yeheskieltame/Tessera.git
cd Tessera && go build -o tessera ./cmd/analyst/
02

Setup AI

# Option A: Claude Code Max plan (auto-detected)
# Option B: Set API key
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="sk-ant-..."
03

Start Server

./tessera serve
04

Open Dashboard

# Open in your browser
http://localhost:8080

17

CLI Commands

3

Data Sources

4

QF Mechanisms

Real-Time

SSE Streaming

Built by Yeheskiel Yunus Rame + Claude Opus 4.6
